title: hedysarum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum
intro: Hedysarum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum, also known as the Siberian or Russian sweet pea, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in aiding digestion, reducing inflammation, and promoting cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Hedysarum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and exert antioxidant effects. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically in creams and ointments.
